events.message: Rolled olapdb-vw-write to v0e2b4d6 (resource limits change)
Node ip-10-0-37-15.us-east-1 condition MemoryPressure is now True (available 180Mi)
System OOM encountered on ip-10-0-37-15, victim cgroup kubepods/olapdb-vw-write
The node was low on resource: memory. Pod olapdb-vw-write-0 evicted (memory request 0, no limit).
Scaled up platform-api-647 (innocent deploy near onset)
Startup probe 503 after reschedule (recovered) — unrelated red herring

note: The MemoryPressure / SystemOOM / Eviction events are all on node ip-10-0-37-15, hosting olapdb-vw-write. The olapdb-vw-write rollout (v0e2b4d6) at 11:42 precedes onset. The platform-api deploy at 11:53 and the prometheus probe 503 (different node) are decoys. olapdb-vw-default (read VW) is on a different node and unaffected.
